name: recipes
description: Local recipe manager for Forger with structured ingredients, steps, categories, favorites, notes, images, observed ingredient prices, and a weekly menu.

changelog.summary: Adds structured MCP tools for Forger agents.
changes: Declares the Recipes MCP server in the app manifest.
Adds structured MCP tools for recipes, ingredients, and weekly planning.
Gives Forger agents a validated app interface for recipe data operations.
Browse recipes as a cookbook list, open recipe detail views, and edit from detail.
Create, edit, search, favorite, rate, and delete recipes.
Manage structured ingredients with catalog autocomplete and fixed unit options.
Administer and delete categories and ingredient catalog entries in dedicated tabs.
Track ingredient prices in separate IngredientPrice records and estimate recipe cost per serving.
Organize recipes by category, attach an image reference, and build a weekly menu with drag and drop ordering across days.

catalog.short_description: A local cookbook with ingredient catalog, costs, and a weekly menu.
catalog.description: Recipes helps one person keep a local cookbook with structured ingredients, ordered steps, categories, favorites, personal notes, ratings, image references, rough cost estimates from observed ingredient prices, and a weekly menu.

capabilities.title: Guardar recetas localmente
capabilities.description: Mantiene recetas, ingredientes, costos y menus dentro del espacio local de la app.

scripts.verify: cd backend && uv run pytest && cd ../frontend && npm run verify
